sn3.17:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho rājā pasenadi kosalo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "atthi nu kho, bhante, eko dhammo yo ubho atthe samādhiggayha tiṭṭhati – diṭṭhadhammikañceva atthaṁ samparāyikañcā"ti?
sn3.17:2.1: "Atthi kho, mahārāja, eko dhammo yo ubho atthe samādhiggayha tiṭṭhati – diṭṭhadhammikañceva atthaṁ samparāyikañcā"ti.
sn3.17:3.1: "Katamo pana, bhante, eko dhammo, yo ubho atthe samādhiggayha tiṭṭhati – diṭṭhadhammikañceva atthaṁ samparāyikañcā"ti?
sn3.17:4.1: "Appamādo kho, mahārāja, eko dhammo, yo ubho atthe samādhiggayha tiṭṭhati – diṭṭhadhammikañceva atthaṁ samparāyikañcāti. Seyyathāpi, mahārāja, yāni kānici jaṅgalānaṁ pāṇānaṁ padajātāni, sabbāni tāni hatthipade samodhānaṁ gacchanti, hatthipadaṁ tesaṁ aggamakkhāyati – yadidaṁ mahantattena; evameva kho, mahārāja, appamādo eko dhammo, yo ubho atthe samādhiggayha tiṭṭhati – diṭṭhadhammikañceva atthaṁ samparāyikañcā"ti. Idamavoca … pe …
